title: The near-death experience of Jane Thompson
description:
Jane Thompson explains how her near-death experience happened, and to what extent it has changed her vision of life and death. Her website: https://www.safehandshealing.com
http://www.anthonychene.com
https://www.instagram.com/anthonychene

With many thanks to Isabel Chiliquinga de Frey for the Spanish subtitles
